name_en: Top-tier Original M66540 Heart Flower BRAZZA Wallet This Brazza wallet made of Monogram canvas exudes an unstoppable masculine aura. Spacious and fully functional, it easily fits into a coat pocket. Holds coins, credit cards, and bills. Dimensions: 10 x 19 x 2 cm
